tasks.label: bulk-format-docs-and-nav
tasks.command:
set -e
cd /Users/xusm/Documents/GitHub/leetcode-top-100
for f in docs/*.md; do
  perl -i -pe 'if (/时间复杂度：|空间复杂度：/) { s/\$//g }' "$f"
  perl -i -pe 's/^# \[[0-9]+\.\s*(.*?)\]\((.*?)\)/# [$1]($2)/' "$f"
  perl -0777 -i -pe 's/\n---\n\n\[← 返回站点首页\]\(index\.md\)\n?/\n/g; s/\n?\[← 返回站点首页\]\(index\.md\)\n?/\n/g' "$f"
done
ruby -e '
lines = File.readlines("mkdocs.yml", chomp: true)
sec = nil
count = 0
lines.map! do |line|
  if (m = line.match(/^  - (\d+)\.[^:]*:$/))
    sec = m[1]
    count = 0
    line
  elsif sec && (m = line.match(/^    - (.+): ([0-9][^ ]*\.md)$/))
    label = m[1].sub(/^\d+\.\s*/, "")
    path = m[2]
    count += 1
    "    - #{sec}.#{count} #{label}: #{path}"
  else
    line
  end
end
lines.map! { |l| l.sub(/^(\s*primary:\s*).*/, "\\1light blue") }
File.write("mkdocs.yml", lines.join("\n") + "\n")
'

tasks.label: finalize-dollar-and-nav-numbering
tasks.command:
cd /Users/xusm/Documents/GitHub/leetcode-top-100 && perl -i -pe 's/\$//g' docs/*.md && ruby <<'RUBY'
path = 'mkdocs.yml'
lines = File.readlines(path, chomp: true)
sec = nil
cnt = 0
lines.map! do |line|
  if (m = line.match(/^  - (\d+)\.[^:]*:$/))
    sec = m[1]
    cnt = 0
    line
  elsif sec && (m = line.match(/^    - (.+): ([0-9][^ ]*\.md)$/))
    label = m[1].sub(/^\d+\.\s*/, '')
    file = m[2]
    cnt += 1
    "    - #{sec}.#{cnt} #{label}: #{file}"
  elsif line =~ /^\s*primary:\s*/
    line.sub(/^\s*primary:\s*.*/, '      primary: light blue')
  else
    line
  end
end
File.write(path, lines.join("\n") + "\n")
RUBY

tasks.label: normalize-nav-label-numbering
tasks.command:
cd /Users/xusm/Documents/GitHub/leetcode-top-100 && ruby <<'RUBY'
path = 'mkdocs.yml'
lines = File.readlines(path, chomp: true)
sec = nil
cnt = 0
lines.map! do |line|
  if (m = line.match(/^  - (\d+)\.[^:]*:$/))
    sec = m[1]
    cnt = 0
    line
  elsif sec && (m = line.match(/^    - (.+): ([0-9][^ ]*\.md)$/))
    label = m[1]
    label = label.sub(/^(?:\d+(?:\.\d+)?\s+)+/, '')
    label = label.sub(/^\d+\.\s*/, '')
    cnt += 1
    "    - #{sec}.#{cnt} #{label}: #{m[2]}"
  else
    line
  end
end
File.write(path, lines.join("\n") + "\n")
RUBY

tasks.label: move-complexity-after-code
move-complexity-back-to-thought
normalize-complexity-format
tasks.command:
cd /Users/xusm/Documents/GitHub/leetcode-top-100 && /Users/xusm/Documents/GitHub/leetcode-top-100/.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re

def normalize_complexity_line(line: str) -> str:
    s = line
    s = s.replace('\\(', '(').replace('\\)', ')')
    s = s.replace('\\cdot', ' * ')
    s = s.replace('\\log', 'log')
    s = s.replace('\\min', 'min')
    s = s.replace('\\max', 'max')
    s = s.replace('\\sum', 'sum')
    s = s.replace('\\Sigma', 'Sigma')
    s = re.sub(r'\\sqrt\{([^{}]+)\}', r'sqrt(\1)', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s{2,}', ' ', s)
    return s

for path in Path('docs').glob('*.md'):
    text = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    lines = text.splitlines(True)
    changed = False
    out = []
    for line in lines:
        if ('时间复杂度' in line) or ('空间复杂度' in line):
            new_line = normalize_complexity_line(line)
            if new_line != line:
                changed = True
            out.append(new_line)
        else:
            out.append(line)
    if changed:
        path.write_text(''.join(out), encoding='utf-8')
PY

tasks.label: normalize-complexity-lines
tasks.command:
cd /Users/xusm/Documents/GitHub/leetcode-top-100 && /Users/xusm/Documents/GitHub/leetcode-top-100/.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re

for path in Path('docs').glob('*.md'):
    text = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    out = []
    changed = False

    for raw in text.splitlines(True):
        line = raw.rstrip('\n')

        # Split malformed single line containing both time and space complexity.
        if '时间复杂度' in line and '空间复杂度' in line and line.find('时间复杂度') < line.find('空间复杂度'):
            idx = line.find('空间复杂度')
            first = line[:idx].rstrip(' ，')
            second = line[idx:].lstrip(' ，')
            for part in (first, second):
                p = part
                p = re.sub(r'时间复杂度\s*\(O\(([^)]+)\)\)', r'时间复杂度：O(\1)', p)
                p = re.sub(r'空间复杂度\s*\(O\(([^)]+)\)\)', r'空间复杂度：O(\1)', p)
                p = re.sub(r'([A-Za-z0-9\)])log', r'\1 log', p)
                p = re.sub(r'([A-Za-z0-9\)])sqrt\(', r'\1 sqrt(', p)
                out.append(p + '\n')
            changed = True
            continue

        if '时间复杂度' in line or '空间复杂度' in line:
            new_line = line
            new_line = re.sub(r'时间复杂度\s*\(O\(([^)]+)\)\)', r'时间复杂度：O(\1)', new_line)
            new_line = re.sub(r'空间复杂度\s*\(O\(([^)]+)\)\)', r'空间复杂度：O(\1)', new_line)
            new_line = new_line.replace('时间复杂度 ', '时间复杂度：') if '时间复杂度：' not in new_line else new_line
            new_line = new_line.replace('空间复杂度 ', '空间复杂度：') if '空间复杂度：' not in new_line else new_line
            new_line = re.sub(r'([A-Za-z0-9\)])log', r'\1 log', new_line)
            new_line = re.sub(r'([A-Za-z0-9\)])sqrt\(', r'\1 sqrt(', new_line)
            if new_line != line:
                changed = True
            out.append(new_line + '\n')
        else:
            out.append(raw)

    if changed:
        path.write_text(''.join(out), encoding='utf-8')
PY
